audit_incident.scope: The first audit's mathematical reconstruction and certificate checks remain valid, but its continuation Boolean omitted the predeclared storage-consistency predicate. The corrected audit preserves the first artifact and holds scaling.

single_next_action.name: weighted-scale-segment-000-compact-v2-audit
single_next_action.scope: Storage-only repackaging of the existing 256 immutable results; no LP, SAT, PB, or new mathematical computation.
single_next_action.method: Retain every exact certificate once. Replace repeated case metadata in receipts and the duplicated case list in protocol/assignment with manifest row indices and hash bindings, then independently bind all 256 compact-v2 receipts to the immutable v1 receipts, reconstruct all domains, and recheck all exact arithmetic certificates.
single_next_action.success_gate: All 256 bindings and arithmetic checks pass, membership is exact, and the measured complete-package projection including 10% safety is at or below 12,102,474 bytes.
single_next_action.stop: Stop after the storage audit. Do not run segment 001 unless a later review explicitly authorizes it.

claim_limit: The 256 audited arithmetic certificates close only their exact depth-two cubes. The storage variance does not invalidate them, and no ancestor or global ledger entry changes.
